core_mechanism: Backward-compatible incremental extension of a greedy agglomerative frequency-driven pair-merging codebook (byte-pair-style dictionary): the same merge process is continued on new data so the original codebook remains a subset and every new codeword has an exact hierarchical decomposition into base codewords, and each new basis vector is warm-started as the average of its constituent base codewords' vectors.
brief_reason: The abstract continues the existing tokenizer's BPE merges so most source tokens carry over unchanged and every new token has an exact decomposition into source tokens, with new embedding rows initialized as the mean of their source sub-token embeddings.
